---
title: "epps6323Skratchpad"
format: html

eval: false
echo: false
---

```{r}

library(haven)
library(data.table)

# 3.3.26 - atm data is pulled but not structure effectively in data table
#        - not all entries are being processed 5904 omitted out of ~6904

df <- as.data.table(read_dta("C:/Users/marti/OneDrive/Documents/Datasets/GSS/gss7224_r2.dta"))

str(df)      # structure + variable types
head(df)     # first few rows
names(df)    # variable names

library(dplyr)
df <- df %>% mutate(across(where(is.labelled), as_factor))



```
